summary: Iter168 Echo Concierge v2 (Guest Experience Orchestration Layer) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 20/20 tests passed covering guest profile, preferences, request CRUD, vendor directory, availability, revenue impact, and LLM itinerary generation. Frontend: 3-column orchestration panel renders correctly with all components working (guest lookup, VIP banner, stay timeline, experience composer, requests queue, vendor directory, revenue impact cards). Regression: iter167 panels (foh-concierge-hub, global-calendar, /seed/plant) all working.

issues: Minor React warning: borderBottomColor/borderBottom style conflict in Tab component - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Echo Concierge panel components working

seed_data_creation: Test requests created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter168 Echo Concierge v2 fully tested and working. The panel uses seeded SEED_GUESTS (5 guests) and SEED_VENDORS (10 vendors) - these are MOCKED in-memory data until CRM integration. LLM itinerary generation may return 502 if budget exhausted - this is expected external limit behavior. Request status lifecycle (pending→in_progress→confirmed→completed) works correctly with history logging.

backend_passed: GET /api/guest/preferences/read?guest_id=g-101 - returns preferences, dietary, mobility, special_dates, learned
POST /api/concierge-v2/request/create - returns 200 with request.id and status='pending'
PATCH /api/concierge-v2/request/{rid} status→completed with actual_revenue - logs history event
POST /api/itinerary/generate - returns itinerary or 502 if LLM budget exhausted
frontend_passed: Echo Concierge panel opens via window.dispatchEvent('open-panel', {detail:{id:'echo-concierge'}})
3-column layout renders correctly (Guest Lookup | Experience Composer | Mission Control)
5 guest rows displayed (concierge-guest-g-101 through g-105) with VIP tier pills
Guest search input (concierge-guest-search) filters guest list
usePanelState persists search query to localStorage key 'echoai3:panel-state:echo-concierge:search'
VIP banner (concierge-vip-banner) shows tier, REPEAT/ANNIVERSARY badges, preferences, dietary alerts
Stay timeline (concierge-stay-timeline) shows date range with today highlighted
Experience Composer prompt textarea (concierge-composer-prompt) and submit button (concierge-composer-submit) present
Right column tabs (concierge-tab-requests, concierge-tab-vendors) switch correctly
Revenue impact section (concierge-revenue-impact) shows 3 cards (REQUESTS 30D, EST, BOOKED)
Active requests queue shows existing requests with Start/Confirm/Complete/Cancel buttons
Status buttons (concierge-req-start-*, concierge-req-confirm-*, etc.) advance request status via PATCH
Vendor directory shows all 10 vendors with prices and ratings
Regression: FOH Concierge Hub panel renders with all 3 tabs
Regression: /seed/plant Co-Build Studio loads with Record build reel button
